backingDescription: USDC lending pool exposure backed by institutional borrower obligations and pool liquidity. Older repo seed describes overcollateralized corporate loans secured by liquid digital-asset collateral; this requires fresh verification before production-grade use.

_meta.notes: Corrected away from Cash Management Pool Treasury backing. Do not use MPLcashUSDC Treasury/repo reserve logic for mUSDC. Needs fresh Maple pool-level verification.
